ktJbqaU9thyQ9z0AlP_7c.title: Task E [ktJb]
ktJbqaU9thyQ9z0AlP_7c.notes:
We need to have a shared vision togather so that we know how to make decisions. It needs to be something we do togather.

This is the prompt from the seven step programme:

    Sit down with your wife and ask these key questions:

    What do we want our marriage to feel like?

    What type of connection and intimacy do we desire?

    What experiences do we want to have together?

    Together, write down 3-5 key elements that define your ideal marriage. 

    Define your non-negotiables—core values that will shape your decisions as a couple. Agree to address these obstacles together
